scripts.format: oxfmt .oxfmtrc.json package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml turbo.json tsconfig.base.json backend frontend
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check .oxfmtrc.json package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml turbo.json tsconfig.base.json backend frontend
scripts.validate: pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm coverage && pnpm build
